profile.name: DICKENS DEUS MANYAMA
profile.professionalSummary: Hands-on Software Developer and Data Scientist focused on building reliable, data-driven systems. I build production-ready apps, integrate APIs, and turn raw data into useful insights. I work across the stack and aim for solutions that are clear, efficient, and maintainable. Final-year Data Science student at EASTC, improving skills in software engineering, cloud-ready systems, and applied machine learning through projects.
profile.careerObjective: To contribute as a hands-on developer and data scientist in building reliable software systems, automation workflows, and AI-powered solutions, while remaining flexible to support broader IT operations.
strengths: Practical problem solving for real-world needs
End-to-end system building (backend, APIs, data pipelines)
Comfortable across software and data science work
Fast learner who adapts to new tools
Focus on reliability, performance, and scale

projects.title: UBX-Eats – Internal Food Ordering System
projects.description: Designed and developed a full internal ordering platform with user roles, order management, and reporting.

projects.title: Digital Card Management System
projects.description: Built a secure digital card generation and management system with an admin dashboard.
